MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-01-2023 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAY-01-2023 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 437C, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. UNOPPOSED MOTION GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RACHEL HO, AN INDIVIDUAL $32,206.15 PRINCIPAL, $1,025.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $33,231.15, SEE SCANNED DOC

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-10-2023 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar May-01-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ASHLEY MULHORN, Esq. of Collection at Law, Inc. (Tel: 818-716-7630) for plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion for Summary Judgment Pursuant to CCP 437C.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for summary judgment pursuant to CCP 437C" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
